overview_md.label: Tunisia Desalination Projects Overview (2026)
overview_md.note: User-provided overview document used to extract station names, capacities, statuses, regional roles, and cited source mapping.

kfw_djerba_stories.label: KfW Stories – Djerba seawater desalination
kfw_djerba_stories.note: Overview citation reports Djerba SWRO commissioning, capacity, intake infrastructure, energy consumption, and recovery ratio.

rosalux_desalination_2025.label: Rosa Luxemburg Stiftung – Desalination Projects in Tunisia
rosalux_desalination_2025.note: Overview citation used for Djerba brine, desalination cost, and wider energy-water nexus context.

weg_djerba_2020.label: WEG Djerba (2020)
weg_djerba_2020.note: Source indicates the Djerba SWRO plant has 50,000 m3/day capacity, expandable to 75,000 m3/day.

wabag_zarat.label: WABAG – Zarat SWRO project
wabag_zarat.note: Overview citation identifies Zarat as a seawater reverse osmosis plant with 50,000 m3/day capacity and offshore intake and outfall works.

world_bank_2026_zarat.label: World Bank (2026) – Zarat
world_bank_2026_zarat.note: Source indicates the Zarat expansion would increase capacity from 50,000 to 100,000 m3/day, serving Gabès, Médenine, and Tataouine.

sonede_brackish_2021.label: SONEDE / UN – Desalination in Tunisia, Solar Energy Bengardane Plant (2021)
sonede_brackish_2021.note: Overview citation provides the main brackish station table, including Kerkennah, Gabès, Djerba BWD, Zarzis, Ben Guerdane, Tozeur, Nafta, Kébili, Douz, Souk Lahad, and Matmata.

jica_sfax_preparatory_2015.label: JICA Preparatory Survey – Sfax SWRO
jica_sfax_preparatory_2015.note: Overview citation used for context on southern brackish systems and water quality constraints.

jica_sfax_evaluation_2017.label: JICA Ex-Ante Evaluation – Sfax Sea Water Desalination Project
jica_sfax_evaluation_2017.note: Overview citation provides Sfax project rationale, initial and planned capacity, location, and Japanese ODA financing context.

tedagua_sfax.label: Tedagua – Sfax desalination plant
tedagua_sfax.note: Overview citation used for Sfax EPC/O&M consortium, infrastructure scope, and project implementation details.

libyaherald_sousse_veolia.label: Libya Herald – Veolia-Sidem Sousse rehabilitation report
libyaherald_sousse_veolia.note: Overview citation notes rehabilitation and technical support work connected to Sousse readiness.

tap_2026_2030_strategy.label: TAP – Tunisia 2026-2030 economic and water infrastructure strategy
tap_2026_2030_strategy.note: Overview citation identifies Mahdia and Mahres 2 as future industrial-zone and supporting water infrastructure sites.

lantania_hicha_project.label: Lantania – Hicha SWRO desalination plant
lantania_hicha_project.note: Overview citation identifies the private Hicha seawater reverse osmosis project capacity and agricultural purpose.

lantania_agro_care.label: Lantania – Agro Care Tunisia desalination announcement
lantania_agro_care.note: Overview citation links Hicha to Agro Care greenhouse irrigation and private agricultural investment.
